projectName: Munview Devcon - Modern Real Estate Website
tagline: Best Real Estate Deals in Joka, Kolkata
locationFocus: Joka, Kolkata | Near Joka Metro Station
designStyle: Modern, luxurious, clean, minimalist with premium real estate feel. Use a color palette of deep navy blue (#0A2540), emerald green accents (#00C48C), warm beige/gold (#F5EDE4), white, and dark gray. High-quality hero images, generous whitespace, smooth animations, and elegant typography (Inter or Satoshi for body, Playfair Display or similar for headings).

responsiveness.desktop: Fully modern website with large hero sections, grid layouts, hover effects, sidebar filters for properties, and sticky navigation.
responsiveness.mobile: Native mobile app-like experience: Top header with logo + menu, prominent search/floating action button, and bottom tab navigation (Home, Properties, Services, About, Contact). Use bottom tabs with icons for seamless native feel.

sections.content: Stunning full-screen hero with high-quality image of Dreamland project or Joka skyline. Overlay text: 'Discover Premium Plots & Homes in Joka, Kolkata' with CTA buttons 'Browse Properties' and 'Get Expert Advice'. Subheadline: 'Starting ₹1,00,000 per Katha | Possession Dec 2021 onwards'.
sections.image: Use existing hero/background images from the website if available; otherwise high-res real estate imagery of green plots, modern homes near metro.

sections.layout: Modern grid cards with image, price, location, possession date, 'For Sale' badge, and 'View Details' button. Highlight Dream Land prominently.

sections.content: Munview Devcon Private Limited: Your Trusted Real Estate Partner in Joka, Kolkata. Include full company description from the site.

sections.layout: Carousel or grid with quotes from Amit Sharma, Priya Mehta, Rohit Verma, Ripan Deshmukh, Sanjay Rao, Arjun Joshi.

sections.text: Ready to Invest in Joka? Let's Build Your Future.

pages.name: Properties
pages.layout: Advanced property listing page with filters (Price, Type, Location, Possession), search bar, map integration placeholder, and detailed modern cards. Each property card uses images from the original site.

properties.name: Dream Land
properties.location: Joka Beside Swaminarayan Mandir / Gotalahat Road, Amtala, 24 Pgs.(S) W.B.
properties.description: Thoughtfully planned residential township... (full description from site)
properties.images: Use all property images and links from the original website (property.html and home)

pages.name: About Us
pages.content: Full company profile including Founder Gaurav Rai details, vision, mission, and experience.

pages.name: Contact
pages.address: 74 Pallymongal colony D H Road Thakurpukur kol-700063
pages.form: Modern contact form + Google Maps embed placeholder

navigation.desktop: Sticky top nav with logo, links (Home, Properties, About, Services, Contact), phone icon, and 'Book Now' button.

globalRequirements.useOriginalImages: Import and use ALL existing image links and assets from https://www.munviewdevcon.com/ and subpages (especially property images, logos, banners).
globalRequirements.realEstateFocus: Emphasize property listings with high-quality photos, key specs (price/katha, size, location, amenities), virtual tour placeholders, and trust signals (RERA mention if available, testimonials).
globalRequirements.performance: Fast loading, optimized images, smooth scroll animations, dark/light mode toggle optional.
globalRequirements.ctaButtons: Prominent 'Enquire Now', 'Schedule Site Visit', 'Download Brochure' buttons with WhatsApp integration.
globalRequirements.footer: Company info, quick links, copyright, social icons (add if needed).

toneAndFeel: Professional yet approachable, trustworthy, premium real estate vibe. Focus on transparency, affordability, and location advantages near Joka Metro.
